_comment: Domain lexicon for the Pehchan-e-Mehdi speaker. Used two ways: (1) eval bucketing in src/dataset_builder.py — a clip is bucketed 'spiritual_term' if its transcript contains any term below; (2) inference initial_prompt (scripts/build_initial_prompt.py). Seeded from EP1-10, EXPANDED 2026-07-25 from the 49-episode reviewed manifest (mined izafat constructions freq>=4 + diacritized durood fragments). Coverage after expansion: 687/2260 clips (30.4%). NOTE: the 7 original undiacritized arabic_phrases match 0 clips in this corpus (reviewers wrote Arabic fully diacritized) — kept only as decoder-biasing tokens for the initial_prompt. Keep the izafat kasra ( ِ ) exactly as the reviewers wrote it — the model learns exactly these spellings.
